_publications._publicationTitle: Inhibition of autophagy as a novel treatment for neurofibromatosis type 1 tumors.

_contextSnippet: We observed significantly higher levels of autophagic flux in dNF1‐KO cells under serum‐free conditions compared to S2R+ controls
details: Showed significantly higher levels of autophagic flux under serum-free conditions compared to S2R+ controls
